rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Compliance With February 2, 2018 Court Order And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 19, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Compliance With February 2, 2018 Court Order And For Sanctions GRANTED as follows: Vlad Cood, as PMK, shall appear for a 4-hour deposition on June 21, 2018 and answer all questions within the scope of previously issued orders. All parties and their counsel are to behave in a civilized manner. If the deposition is videotaped, a copy of the recording shall be provided to the Court by noon on June 22, 2018. A copy of the deposition transcript to be provided to the Court by noon on June 25, 2018. Vlad Cood, as PMK, and his counsel to pay the extra fee charged for expedited transcript (if recording cannot be provided to the Court). If based on the review of the record/transcript, the Court determines that any party or any counsel failed to behave in a civilized or professional manner, the Court will set an OSC re: Contempt. Based on the review of the transcripts of prior depositions all parties and all counsel have to adjust their attitude and levels of confrontation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 19, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Documents as to the physical condition of the property are relevant to Pure Entertainment's 4th Amended Complaint. Documents to be produced by 4:00 p.m. on June 21. Private information, such as the value of the property may be redacted. Additionally, communications between and E-Appraisal and Hom that do not concern the physical condition of the property may be withheld. Sanctions are denied as to each party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 19, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions GRANTED in accordance with the rulings on other discovery motions. All parties and all counsel may be present at all depositions subject to their ability to behave in civilized and professional manner in order to timely complete the depositions without waste of time and recourses. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pure Entertainment, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 19, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, VLAD COOD Pure Entertainment, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order GRANTED as follows. Stephen Hom, shall appear for a 7-hour deposition on June 22, 2018 and answer all questions within the scope of discovery in this action. All parties and their counsel are to behave in a civilized manner. If the deposition is videotaped, a copy of the recording shall be provided to the Court by noon on June 25, 2018. A copy of the deposition transcript to be provided to the Court by noon on June 25, 2018. Stephen Hom and his counsel to pay the extra fee charged for expedited transcript. If based on the review of the record and transcript, the Court determines that any party or any counsel failed to behave in a civilized or professional manner, the Court will set an OSC re: Contempt. Based on the review of the transcripts of prior depositions all parties and all counsel have to adjust their attitude and levels of confrontation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Continue Action Against Deceased Defendant By Naming Her Personal Representative Stephen Hom
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 19, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC, Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Continue Action Against Deceased Defendant By Naming Her Personal Representative Stephen Hom DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 377.41 requirements. The motion is not accompanied by any proof of compliance with Probate Code sections governing creditor's claims. E.g. no proof of claim ever been made or rejected. Reference to prior Court's ruling regarding timeliness in Cordova Declaration, paragraph 11 is not supported by an Order or hearing transcript. Relevance and sufficiency of such ruling re: compliance with all requirements of Probate Sections 9000 et seq. is not explained. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. GRANTED with leave to amend to allege a valid lease agreement. The September 30, 2016 Amended Lease Agreement is invalid in light of the June 6, 2016 Bankruptcy Order. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. No objections filed and Cross-Complainant relies on Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice exhibits in opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena Request For Sanctions And Finding Of Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC'S Amended Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena Request For Sanctions And Finding Of Contempt. GRANTED. WB Coyle is ordered to appear for deposition on June 25, 2018 (unless parties agree on another date for deposition to take place no later than June 26, 2018). Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,000 to be paid no later than June 26, 2018. If WB Coyle fails to appear for deposition, Plaintiff may appear ex-parte and request a date of OSC Re: Contempt. =(501/REQ)
